documentation.description: Demonstrate native uint64[] — literal creation, .push(), .length, indexing, for...of.

documentation.returns: sum of all fixed array elements

documentation.description: Demonstrate ReferenceArray — dynamic sizing with .push(), .pop(), .at(), .length, for...of.
documentation.returns: sum of remaining elements after pop

documentation.description: Demonstrate clone() — deep copy prevents aliasing.
documentation.returns: original first element, proving clone independence

documentation.description: Demonstrate urange() — uint64 range iteration with 1, 2, and 3 args.
documentation.returns: sum from the stepped urange iteration

documentation.description: Demonstrate .entries() on FixedArray — yields [index, value] pairs.
